question_text: Which of the following is an example of energy being transferred rather than created?

options.label: A
options.text: A battery creating electrical energy from nothing

options.label: B
options.text: A light bulb converting electrical energy into light and heat energy

options.label: C
options.text: A moving car creating kinetic energy from nowhere

options.label: D
options.text: A microwave creating heat energy without using electricity

explanation: The light bulb converts electrical energy (from the power supply) into light and heat energy. No energy is created—it is simply transformed from one form into other forms.
